question: Find top 10 customers by total order amount
sql: SELECT TOP 10 c.id, c.name, SUM(o.total) AS total_spent FROM customers c JOIN orders o ON o.customerId = c.id GROUP BY c.id, c.name ORDER BY total_spent DESC

question: Count orders grouped by status
sql: SELECT status, COUNT(*) AS count FROM orders GROUP BY status ORDER BY count DESC

question: Find users who never placed an order
sql: SELECT u.* FROM users u LEFT JOIN orders o ON o.userId = u.id WHERE o.id IS NULL

question: Get paginated list of products with category names
sql: SELECT p.id, p.name, c.name AS category FROM products p JOIN categories c ON p.categoryId = c.id ORDER BY p.name OFFSET 0 ROWS FETCH NEXT 20 ROWS ONLY

question: Search users by name with LIKE
sql: SELECT id, name, email FROM users WHERE name LIKE ''%'' + @search + ''%'' ORDER BY name
